# Fast Arena — Copilot Instructions

## Start Here

Before any task, read [`docs/ai/index.md`](../docs/ai/index.md).
It routes you to the right documentation based on task type.

## Canonical Docs

| What you need | File |
|---|---|
| Product domain, entities, rules | [`docs/domain.md`](../docs/domain.md) |
| Code structure, modules, data flow | [`docs/architecture.md`](../docs/architecture.md) |
| Project-specific code style | [`docs/code-style.md`](../docs/code-style.md) |
| Long-term direction | [`docs/roadmap.md`](../docs/roadmap.md) |
| Current tasks | [`docs/todo.md`](../docs/todo.md) |
| Commands and pitfalls | [`docs/ai/commands.md`](../docs/ai/commands.md), [`docs/ai/pitfalls.md`](../docs/ai/pitfalls.md) |

## Constraints

- Do not invent rules absent from `docs/domain.md`.
- Follow `docs/code-style.md` for repository-specific style decisions.
- Keep changes within the scope of the current task.
- MVP assumptions are current behavior; roadmap items are not.
- When in doubt about business meaning, ask before changing behavior.
